tree.name: Rudy Gobert
tree.tradeDescription: Blockbuster trade: Timberwolves received Rudy Gobert from Jazz for Malik Beasley, Patrick Beverley, Walker Kessler, Jarred Vanderbilt, Leandro Bolmaro, 2023 1st (unprotected), 2025 1st (unprotected), 2027 1st (unprotected), 2029 1st (top-5 protected), and 2026 1st round pick swap rights
tree.note: 4x Defensive Player of the Year, French center

assetsGivenUp.name: Malik Beasley
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 4-team trade: MIN sent Robert Covington + Jordan Bell to HOU, Keita Bates-Diop + Shabazz Napier + Noah Vonleh to DEN. MIN received Malik Beasley, Juancho Hernangomez, Jarred Vanderbilt from DEN, Evan Turner + 2020 1st (ATL's, became #17 Pokusevski) from ATL.
assetsGivenUp.note: Florida State guard, acquired from Denver in 4-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Robert Covington
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MIN traded Jimmy Butler and Justin Patton to PHI for Robert Covington, Dario Šarić, Jerryd Bayless, and a 2022 2nd round pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from 76ers in Jimmy Butler trade, sent to HOU in 4-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Jimmy Butler
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MIN traded Zach LaVine, Kris Dunn, and Lauri Markkanen (#7 pick) to CHI for Jimmy Butler and Justin Patton
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from Bulls for Zach LaVine, Kris Dunn, and 2017 #7 pick (Lauri Markkanen)

assetsGivenUp.name: Zach LaVine
assetsGivenUp.note: UCLA guard, 2014 #13 overall pick

assetsGivenUp.name: Kris Dunn
assetsGivenUp.note: Providence guard, 2016 #5 overall pick

assetsGivenUp.name: 2017 1st Round Pick (#7)
assetsGivenUp.note: MIN 2017 1st round pick, became Lauri Markkanen for CHI

assetsGivenUp.name: Keita Bates-Diop
assetsGivenUp.note: Ohio State forward, 2018 2nd round pick, sent to DEN

assetsGivenUp.name: Shabazz Napier
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MIN traded draft rights to Lior Eliyahu to GSW for Treveon Graham, Shabazz Napier, and cash
assetsGivenUp.note: UConn guard, acquired from Golden State. Sent to DEN in 4-team trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Noah Vonleh
assetsGivenUp.note: Forward, signed as free agent. Sent to DEN in 4-team trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jordan Bell
assetsGivenUp.note: Forward, signed as free agent. Sent to HOU in 4-team trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Patrick Beverley
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MIN traded Jarrett Culver and Juancho Hernangomez to MEM for Patrick Beverley
assetsGivenUp.note: Arkansas guard, acquired from Grizzlies. MIN sent Jarrett Culver + Juancho Hernangomez to MEM.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jarrett Culver
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MIN traded Cameron Johnson (#11) and Dario Šarić to PHX for Jarrett Culver (#6)
assetsGivenUp.note: Texas Tech guard, 2019 #6 overall pick. Selected by PHX, traded to MIN.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2019 1st Round Pick (#11)
assetsGivenUp.note: MIN 2019 1st round pick, used to select Cameron Johnson for PHX

assetsGivenUp.name: Dario Šarić
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired in Jimmy Butler trade (same trade as Covington). MIN traded Butler + Patton to PHI for Covington, Šarić, Bayless, 2022 2nd.
assetsGivenUp.note: Croatian forward, from PHI in Butler trade. Shared cost — same origin chain as Covington above.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jimmy Butler
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MIN traded Zach LaVine, Kris Dunn, and 2017 #7 pick (Lauri Markkanen) to CHI for Jimmy Butler and Justin Patton
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared cost with Covington branch

assetsGivenUp.name: Zach LaVine
assetsGivenUp.note: UCLA guard, 2014 #13 overall pick

assetsGivenUp.name: Kris Dunn
assetsGivenUp.note: Providence guard, 2016 #5 overall pick

assetsGivenUp.name: Juancho Hernangomez
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from DEN in same 4-team trade as Beasley and Vanderbilt
assetsGivenUp.note: Spanish forward, acquired from DEN in 4-team trade. Shared cost — same origin chain as Beasley branch above.

assetsGivenUp.name: Robert Covington
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared cost — full chain detailed in Beasley branch: Butler trade → LaVine (draft #13) + Dunn (draft #5) + 2017 #7 pick (Markkanen)

assetsGivenUp.name: Keita Bates-Diop
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared cost with Beasley. Sent to DEN.

assetsGivenUp.name: Noah Vonleh
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared cost with Beasley. Sent to DEN.

assetsGivenUp.name: Walker Kessler
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MIN traded #19 pick (Jake LaRavia) and 2023 2nd round pick (Gregory Jackson II) to MEM for Walker Kessler (#22) and TyTy Washington Jr.
assetsGivenUp.note: Auburn center, selected #22 by MEM, traded to MIN

assetsGivenUp.name: 2022 1st Round Pick (#19)
assetsGivenUp.note: MIN original 2022 1st round pick, selected LaRavia for MEM

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 2nd Round Pick (#45)
assetsGivenUp.note: MIN 2023 2nd round pick, sent to MEM

assetsGivenUp.name: Jarred Vanderbilt
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from DEN in same 4-team trade as Beasley
assetsGivenUp.note: Kentucky forward, drafted #41 overall by Denver in 2018. Shared cost — same origin chain as Beasley branch.

assetsGivenUp.name: Robert Covington
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared cost — full chain in Beasley branch: Butler trade → LaVine (draft #13) + Dunn (draft #5) + 2017 #7 pick

assetsGivenUp.name: Keita Bates-Diop
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared cost with Beasley — sent to DEN

assetsGivenUp.name: Noah Vonleh
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared cost with Beasley — sent to DEN

assetsGivenUp.name: Leandro Bolmaro
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Part of 3-team draft night trade: MIN sent Mathias Lessort + DET 2023 2nd round pick to NYK, received Bolmaro (#23). Same trade that brought McDaniels from OKC.
assetsGivenUp.note: Argentine guard, selected #23 by NYK, traded to MIN

assetsGivenUp.name: Mathias Lessort
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MIN traded Daniel Oturu to LAC for Mathias Lessort and DET 2023 2nd round pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from LAC in Daniel Oturu trade. Draft rights sent to NYK.

assetsGivenUp.name: Daniel Oturu
assetsGivenUp.note: Minnesota center, 2020 2nd round pick (#33). Traded to LAC for Lessort + DET 2023 2nd.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 2nd Round Pick via DET
assetsGivenUp.note: Detroit's 2023 2nd round pick, acquired from LAC in Daniel Oturu trade, sent to NYK

assetsGivenUp.name: Daniel Oturu
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared cost with Lessort above. 2020 2nd round pick.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 1st Round Pick (#16)
assetsGivenUp.note: MIN 2023 1st round pick (unprotected), conveyed as #16 to UTA

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#21)
assetsGivenUp.note: MIN 2025 1st round pick (unprotected), conveyed as #21 to UTA

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 1st Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: MIN 2027 1st round pick (unprotected)

assetsGivenUp.name: 2029 1st Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: MIN 2029 1st round pick (top-5 protected)

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 1st Round Pick Swap Rights
assetsGivenUp.note: Utah Jazz hold the right to swap 1st round picks with Minnesota in 2026
